name: current_instance
short_description: Set or get the current instance
full_help:
current_instance

Description: 
Set or get the current instance

Syntax: 
current_instance  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<instance>]

Returns: 
instance name

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<instance>]  Name of instance

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
